decks.name: English Opening: King's English Variation
decks.description: Line trainer for the English Opening: King's English Variation, generated from the canonical opening database (lichess-org/chess-openings): 26 positions drilled book-move by book-move from White's side across 53 named variations. Cards are introduced shallow-to-deep, shuffled across lines within each depth; the back gives the line so far, the variation name and ECO code.

decks.name: The Caro-Kann Defense
decks.description: A grinder's Caro-Kann: the original concept cards plus a line trainer built from the canonical opening database (lichess-org/chess-openings). Every named Caro-Kann variation, drilled book-move by book-move from Black's side: Advance, Classical, Exchange, Panov, Fantasy, Two Knights, and the offbeat sidelines. Line cards are introduced shallow-to-deep, shuffled across variations; each back shows the line so far with the variation name and ECO code.

decks.name: The London System
decks.description: Learn to play the London System as White, one position at a time: the core setup against ...d5, the anti-fianchetto setup, the right answers to ...Qb6 and the poisoned b2-pawn, and classic attacking patterns like the Greek gift on h7. Every card shows a position; you supply the book move.

decks.name: The Sicilian Defense
decks.description: A club player's working map of the Sicilian, one position at a time: the Open Sicilian trunk move by move, the Najdorf, Dragon, Sveshnikov, and Classical variations, and how to meet the Alapin and Rossolimo anti-Sicilians. Every card shows a board from Black's side and asks for the best move and the plan behind it.
